mapper.insert: INSERT INTO product_orders ( order_group_id, product_id, quantity, note, ordered_by, created_at ) VALUES ( #{orderGroupId}, #{productId}, #{quantity}, #{note}, #{orderedBy}, #{createdAt} )
mapper.select: SELECT id, order_group_id, product_id, quantity, note, ordered_by, created_at FROM product_orders ORDER BY created_at DESC, id DESC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT id, order_group_id, product_id, quantity, note, ordered_by, created_at FROM product_orders WHERE order_group_id = #{orderGroupId} ORDER BY id ASC
SELECT id, order_group_id, product_id, quantity, note, ordered_by, created_at FROM product_orders WHERE id = #{id}
